author: ec2-user
text: 2auf.64 audit confirmed broader pre-existing RFC 9528 incompatibility in Python EDHOC: legacy METHOD_CORR and CoAP framing, C_R placement, TH_3/TH_4 inputs, KDF/exporter stages, compact C_I encoding, and sender/recipient IDs require independent RFC 9529 vectors. Deliberately excluded from the single-use state-machine fix; address here as protocol validation/migration.
